violations.text: The hand sink in the front service area was lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
The light shield in the storage area was observed with previous water damage. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

A mat was observed hanging on the handwashing sink near the 3-bay sink. Handwashing sinks must not be used for anything other than handwashing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
Single-use articles (cups and containers) were observed stored on the floor. Single-use articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
